items.title: Luxury Winter Cinematic Collage
items.description: A premium three-frame vertical collage capturing a serene winter lakeside story with cinematic realism, soft lighting, and elegant storytelling across close-up, landscape, and interior scenes.
items.prompt:
Create a high-quality three-frame vertical collage (top, middle, bottom) featuring the uploaded person as the main subject — keep her exact face, skin tone, hairstyle, and identity fully consistent across all frames. The entire collage should evoke a luxurious cinematic winter mood with emotional serenity and realistic detail.

General Style & Atmosphere:
A tranquil snowy lakeside scene in the mountains, captured in soft daylight with gentle snowfall. The environment conveys calm isolation and cinematic beauty — muted whites, cool blue tones, faint mist over the water, and delicate natural lighting. The subject wears a thick ivory-white fur coat with a large hood and matching scarf that frame her face gracefully, reflecting both warmth and sophistication. Lighting should be natural, overcast, and diffused (around 5200 K), creating smooth, even skin tones with subtle rosy cheeks and soft catchlights in the eyes. Snowflakes in motion add realism and texture.

Frame Composition:
• Top Frame (Close-up Portrait): A tight frontal shot focusing on the subject's face framed by the fluffy white fur hood. She gazes calmly toward the camera, her expression serene and confident. Individual snowflakes rest lightly on her hair and hood. The depth of field is very shallow (f/2.0), keeping the face sharp while the background fades into a soft, cool blur. The composition highlights the luxurious detail of the fur and the luminous quality of her eyes, evoking a cinematic intimacy.

• Middle Frame (Wide Landscape Shot): A full-body shot taken from behind, showing the subject standing near the edge of a half-frozen alpine lake surrounded by mountains and pine forests. A small wooden cabin covered in snow appears to the right side of the frame, its reflection faintly visible on the calm, icy water. The perspective emphasizes vastness and solitude, with the horizon line placed low to showcase the scale of the mountains. Snow falls gently across the frame, and the subject's coat and hood stand out in soft contrast against the bluish landscape. Subtle atmospheric haze and mist over the lake add depth and realism.

• Bottom Frame (Car Interior Profile): A cinematic side-profile shot of the subject sitting inside a car, gazing out through a frosted window at the snowy scenery. Natural daylight filters in from outside, illuminating her face and the rich texture of the fur. The interior of the car features soft brown leather seats and dark wood details, creating a warm contrast to the cold exterior. Raindrops and snow streaks on the window add realism, while reflections from the glass subtly echo the outside landscape.

Cinematography & Aesthetic:
Shot on a virtual 50mm lens with shallow depth of field and cinematic framing. Soft film grain, balanced exposure, realistic reflections, and gentle color grading (cool whites, silvery highlights, light blush tones). The overall tone is calm, elegant, and premium — reminiscent of luxury travel photography or a winter fashion editorial. Each frame should maintain consistent color temperature, lighting, and visual coherence to feel like one continuous narrative sequence.

Output:
Generate as a 9:16 vertical collage composed of three equally stacked frames (top: close-up, middle: wide shot by the lake, bottom: profile in car). No text, no overlays, clean borders. The final result should look cohesive, realistic, and emotionally cinematic.
items.keywords: winter, luxury, cinematic, collage, lakeside, snow, fur coat, mountain, premium, editorial
